title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 19 2021
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 19 2021
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report November 19 2021
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 19/11/2021
DCE iron ore recovered in the afternoon.an increase of 2.49% throughout the day. The spot quotation in the morning almost kept steady.Some traders were active to sell, steel mills purchased on demand.The trading volumes has increase.PBF at Shandong port dealt 565-575 yuan/mt, increased -5-5 yuan/mt over yesterday. PBF at Tangshan port dealt 560-570 yuan/mt, the same as yesterday.
